 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Inglis Banner

1000m
Class: 2-Y-O, Set Weights, Inglis horses only
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Moderate tempo with little speed on paper. STREISAND finished a neck back from the leader at only start at Flemington, leading hope. BLANDFORD BARON has won or placed in both races so far and last start winner to break maiden at Morphettville, not without each-way claims. ANGELIC RISE first start and from a good stable, still in this. FREE FLYING only just missed at only start, finishing half a length back from the winner at Caulfield and from a good stable, could threaten.

Selections

  • 6. Streisand (1) $6.50
  • 1. Blandford Baron (2) $21.00
  • 7. Angelic Rise (6) $6.25
  • 5. Free Flying (11) $6.00
